title: High CMD
description: This mod aims to add a few weapons and an entity which are uh, strong obviously.
body:
IMPORTANT: V5 AND ABOVE WILL FREEZE THE GAME WHEN USING DEATH TERMINAL, JUST USE TASK MANAGER TO CLOSE MINECRAFT THEN JOIN THE WORLD AFTER RUNNING MINECRAFT AGAIN.

!!!DISCONTINUED, USE IF YOU WANT!!!
A mod that adds four new weapons and a glitched entity.

CMD in the name stands for Command Prompt which is what this mod is about, swords that look like they use the command prompt.

This mod uses the Kooler system to rank its swords.

This mod's production has halted because I'm building a remaster.

Weapons

CMD Sword
- INF STATS
- Discard (Uses the discard function which is a despawn.)
- T1

CMD Sword LVL2
- INF STATS
- Remove (Uses the remove function which is you guessed it, a higher level of erasure but it can still be overriden.)
- T1

CMD Sword LVL3
- INF STATS
- setRemoved (Uses the setRemoved function which cannot be overriden making it way stronger than CMD Sword LVL2.)
- T2

Death Terminal
- INF STATS
- setRemoved
- Ban (Global, This means that the ban is global, without an eventbus. V3 AND HIGHER), (Global, EVENTBUS, This means that this ban is global and it uses an eventbus so mods can unregister the eventbus using reflection [reflection is when you access private fields when Java is running so you can do what you like to that private field], eventbus is basically how forge checks what happens in the game and when the eventbus shutsdown, the action related to the eventbus will not work at all. V2 AND BELOW)
- T2, T3 (V2), Low-T4 (V3 and V4), T4 (V5 and above)
-Absolute destruction (Pressing B while holding the sword will destroy the game, only in V2 and above.)

Entities

Terminal
- Can't be setRemoved
- Harder to Global ban
- Shuts down the eventbus
- Low-T4

(TEST)

- Kelenus from TSM
- Not even done
- T0, grows
- 1.18.2

 

Global Bans are when you cancel spawning for all entities so that they can't respawn.

Pressing K will turn the ban off.

V2 might not be able to turn bans off yet.

Some 1.20.1 versions are bugged, confirmed non-bugged ones are V1, V2, V4 and above.
